findings.title: User Behavior Tracking Pipeline
findings.description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak and store raw events with full user identifiers for profile enrichment downstream.
assumptions: The infrastructure can support the required event throughput.
recommendations: Ensure compliance with GDPR during data capture.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is authenticated WHEN they browse content THEN their behavior metrics are captured and stored in real-time.

findings.title: ML Recommendation Engine
findings.description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions. The model should incorporate collaborative filtering and content-based approaches, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
assumptions: Sufficient user data is available for training the model.
recommendations: Conduct A/B testing to validate improvements in CTR.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available WHEN the recommendation engine is deployed THEN it should improve content CTR by at least 20% within 60 days.

findings.title: User Preference Dashboard
findings.description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays the behavioral data collected about them, including inferred interests and engagement patterns. Include toggles to opt out of specific tracking categories.
assumptions: Users will engage with the dashboard to manage their preferences.
recommendations: Ensure the dashboard is user-friendly and accessible.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their dashboard WHEN they view their data THEN they should see their inferred interests and have the option to opt out of tracking.

findings.title: Cross-Device Tracking Implementation
findings.description: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching to enable a unified user profile.
assumptions: Users will be logged in across devices.
recommendations: Ensure compliance with privacy regulations during implementation.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices WHEN they perform actions THEN their activity should be linked to a single user profile.

findings.title: GDPR Compliance Audit
findings.description: Conduct a full GDPR compliance audit to address concerns regarding lawful processing of behavioral data, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
assumptions: Legal team will provide necessary guidelines for compliance.
recommendations: Complete the audit before product launch.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit team is assembled WHEN the audit is conducted THEN all GDPR compliance issues must be identified and documented.

findings.title: Privacy Opt-Out Mechanism
findings.description: Implement a granular consent mechanism that allows users to opt out of specific data tracking categories, ensuring compliance with GDPR.
assumptions: Users will utilize the opt-out options.

evidence.excerpt: Users require more granular consent mechanisms for data tracking.

recommendations: Ensure the opt-out process is clear and easy to use.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their privacy settings WHEN they choose to opt out THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

findings.title: Data Export for Advertisers
findings.description: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring that individual re-identification is not possible.
recommendations: Validate the anonymization pipeline before launch.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the API is implemented WHEN advertisers request user segments THEN only anonymized data should be provided.

findings.title: User Feedback Collection
findings.description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on the personalization features to continuously improve the recommendation engine.
assumptions: Users will provide feedback on their experiences.

evidence.excerpt: Conduct A/B testing on the new recommendation engine.

recommendations: Incorporate feedback loops into the product development process.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is live WHEN users interact with the personalization features THEN they should be able to submit feedback easily.

findings.title: Monitoring and Alerting for Data Pipeline
findings.description: Set up monitoring and alerting for the user behavior tracking pipeline to ensure data integrity and performance.
assumptions: Monitoring tools will be effective in detecting issues.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN data anomalies occur THEN alerts should be triggered to the engineering team.
metadata.story_title: Set up monitoring and alerting for data pipeline

findings.title: Data Retention Policy Implementation
findings.description: Establish a data retention policy that complies with GDPR, detailing how long user data will be stored and the process for data deletion.

evidence.excerpt: Legal compliance risks must be addressed.

recommendations: Document the data retention policy clearly.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the policy is established WHEN user data is collected THEN it should be retained according to the defined policy.

findings.title: User Engagement Metrics Tracking
findings.description: Implement tracking for user engagement metrics, including session duration and content consumption, to inform product improvements.
assumptions: Engagement metrics will provide actionable insights.

evidence.excerpt: User Engagement Score is defined as a composite metric.

recommendations: Use engagement metrics to guide feature development.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user engagement metrics are implemented WHEN users interact with the platform THEN their engagement should be tracked accurately.

summary: The analysis resulted in a comprehensive set of requirements focused on user behavior tracking, GDPR compliance, and personalized content recommendations. Each requirement is structured with clear acceptance criteria and dependencies, ensuring a robust foundation for the PersonaLens product development.
